steps.title: Apply the organic-only limit
steps.content: The farmers have no access to inorganic soil additives, so any option using NPK fertilizer must be excluded. The best remaining option must produce the greatest improvement in fruit weight and size among organic treatments.

steps.title: Compare the organic gains
steps.content: A includes inorganic NPK fertilizer. C and D are organic but produce smaller gains than the combined organic treatment. The biochar-and-compost treatment gives the highest listed organic values: 979.3 g weight, 6.76 cm length, and 13.68 cm diameter.

steps.title: Select the best treatment
steps.content: The organic combination with the greatest gains is biochar and compost. The answer is B.
